title: MuslinZ White Baby Muslin Cloths, Baby Burp Cloths, Baby Muslins, Baby Diaper Cloths, 100% Pure Cotton, Newborn Baby Essential (6 pack - 70x70cms)
features: MuslinZ White 100% Cotton muslin cloths. 6 pack
A baby essential for newborns. Multi use for dribbles, feeding, burping, general mopping up, as a reusable nappy and a baby comforter. So many uses !
Breathable, Absorbent, Easy to Wash and Quick to Dry. MuslinZ get softer the more you wash them, with less shrinkage and wrinkling. Still look good after many washes.
MuslinZ UK brand - designed in the UK. All products are made to Oeko-Tex 100 Standard. We care about our products and how they are made.
Machine washable 40°C. We recommend you wash before first use. This will increase the softness and absorbency.
description: Product Description Why Choose MuslinZ Soft & Lightweight Muslin cloths for baby made from 100% soft cotton—lightweight, breathable, and safe from birth. A must-have for every baby bag. Ultra-absorbent Ultra-absorbent, durable muslin squares – perfect as a newborn reusable nappy, baby burp cloth, mopping up spills and so much more! Generous Size & Versatile Generous 70x70cm size— An all-in-one baby essential perfect for feeding, cleaning, changing, and soothing. A parenting must-have! Easy Care - Machine washable For best results, machine wash at 40°C and tumble dry on a low heat. Pre-wash before first use is recommended to maximise softness and absorbency. MuslinZ Exclusive Designs At MuslinZ, every print and product is thoughtfully designed by our Oxfordshire-based team, combining softness and style with the everyday practicality parents need. High-quality, ethical, affordable—MuslinZ is baby care you can trust. About us British Brand We’re proud to be a British brand dedicated to creating high-quality baby essentials. Founded in 2012 and based in Oxfordshire. Passion For Textiles We’re passionate about textiles and know how important it is for baby products to deliver on performance, safety, and softness. Sustainability At The Heart Sustainability is key at MuslinZ: local sourcing, sea freight, recyclable packaging, and conscious practices help reduce our carbon footprint. Made With Care Our ISO, Sedex & Oeko-Tex certified factories ensure products meet Oeko-Tex 100—safe, non-toxic & gentle for babies and the planet. MuslinZ for quality, value and a great range of products The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. The video compares multiple products.
